title: Counter Strike Grenades
description: Add utilities in CS2 to Minecraft
body: # Counter Strike Grenades This mod provides utilities in CS2(with smoke falling mechanics) to Minecraft. > This is a WIP project > We encourage you to download the lastest version and update to latest version when possible ## Dependencies - [Kotlin For Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge) ## Features - HE Grenade - Interaction with Smoke - Flash Bang - Incendiary (Molotov) - Different varaints based on team - Interaction with Smoke - Smoke Grenade - Integration with the Tacz Gun Mod - Decoy - Integration with the Tacz Gun Mod ## Checkout up-to-date info on Github: [ThePisquad/CounterStrikeGrenades](https://github.com/ThePisquad/CounterStrikeGrenades)
